titleStmt.title: SII 29.75: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 75. (A.R. No. B. 576 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab near the temple known as Nelaguḍi.

It states that when Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla was ruling from the capital Jayantīpura, the mahājanas of agrahāra Rūḍhi made a grant of land for the benefit of the temple of Vāsudēva built by Madhuvapayya alias Madhusūdhana-daṇḍanāyaka whose genealogy is given. Of the lands granted, one was purchased by them from Chandikabbe, the wife of Chandraśēkhara-bhaṭṭa.

It also records grants of income from levies on articles such as pepper, ginger, suger, Jaggery etc., to the same deity by the nānādēśi and other bodies of agrahāra Rūḍi. The administrative division Karaḍikal-300 is mentioned here. The record is damaged. The top portion is broken, hence, a few lines in the beginning are lost.
It is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 43 • • • • • • • • • • Phālguṇa, Pūrṇima, Thursday. It probably corresponds to 1119 A.D., February 27, Thursday, [Śaka 1040, Vilambi].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
dvijanmārādhya
kāśyapa gōtrana ya
navadya śritiyiṁ prabhutva guṇadiṁ satpōkti
manucāritra vivēkadiṁ vibhavadiṁ sāmrājyadiṁ sāmartthyadiṁ
ḷatva(da) śarahāṁsakaṟa gōtra vāranāgirddu māntanadiṁ dhātrige vāsu
karnnāṭa vaṁśōdbhavaṁ . (śā)rimahīsaṁbhavaṁ vāgmitege [pūṇdarade ?] sa
mauktikahāra kāramene baravaballe vicārisuvaḍe vāsudēva (agoḷunā)
yyuguṁ Avaroḷu sauṁdaryya mārggaṁ negaḻveḍedoṟenāḷkaṁ paṇaṁ nāḍu nibba
yoḷu mukuṁda riṣyāśramavenaladaṟoḷū nāgadēvaṁ vasiddha pra
diṁ tadvibhaṁgavolaviniṁ sāviyakkaṁgavakṣyatsavadindaṁ sāviyakkaṁ
dadiṁ vāsudēvaṁ kritārtthaṁ . Ādaṁpatigaḷegoppa putraresada
śrī madhusūdhanaṁdharege sandā mūṣiyakkaṁ dharitri dēvōtta
(ri dēvi bhū)dvaṁdyegaṁ gādavistute lakṣmīdēviyenisirdda khyāta
vipuḷa śrī stanakuṁkumāṁkita viśīḷōra sthaḷaṁ bhāratōlalane
darppaṇa yaśōvalli pratāśāṁgaḷva prasabhā dātta mārgganene peṁpa
kāśyapagōtraṁ madhusūdhanaṁ parahita vyāpāra pārāyaṇaṁ .
tere yaṁ karaḍikalmūnuṟaṟoḷu mikku bannigoḷaṁ raṁjipudalli mā
daṁ bharadhvāja gōtra guṇaṁtatsati jakkaṇabbeya ®piṁ puṭṭiyakkaṁ ma
vege kāntaṁ madhusūdhana prabhuvenalu peṁpaṁ mahībhāgadoḷu .
puṁṇya śakti manujākritiyaṁgeḍegoṁḍu pūṇvu puṭṭuvavolu dārimā
carasanā tanaḷāsuta vāsudēvanoppuva guṇa sāviyakkananavadyavacōṁbudhi
padmanābhaneṁbivara tanūjarāge madhusūdhananēṁkrita krityanādanō .
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattibhu
vanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire jayantipurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōda
diṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . svasti śrīmacaḷukya vikramavarṣada 43 ne
saṁvatsarada phālguṇa puṇname brahaspati vāradaṁdu śrī
rvva namasyādagrahāraṁ rūḍhiya Aśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷu madhuvasa
yakaṁ māḍisida śrī vāsudēvarige gollageṟeyoḷagappeya kṣaṇaṁtiyara bā
biṭṭa gadde kamma 200 Alliṁ paḍuvalu hūvina tōṁṭake biṭṭa kamma 200 Ādē
dīvigege koṭṭa(gā) yilevoṁ (1) rūḍiya hadinālvarūroḍeyaru madhuvaparu
(ru) māḍisida śrīvāsudēvarige tamma prathama sthaḷa gaddeyoḷage biṭṭa kaṁ
samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahānāḍugaḷa nānādēśiyūmaṁ
(ḷa) mukhyavāgi rūḍhiyaluṁ madhuvapayyanāyakaru māḍisida śrī
naivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ caitra pavitrakkaṁ koṭṭāyaveṁteṁdare samasta
meḷasu suṁṭhi hippali sakhkhare bella Arisinavalla sāsave jīrage
daṁgaḷella luṁ hoṁge koṭṭalliyaretīsa koṁḍalli
ṭṭaru hēṟinge Ele 100 hottaḷa kratumaṁ koṭṭaru . śrī matsarvvana
hāraṁ rūḍiyalu madhuvapayya nāyakaru tāvu māḍisida śrī vāsudēva
draśēkharabhaṭṭara madavaḷige caradikabbeya kayyalu krayaṁgoṁḍā hāga vri
sahitavādēvara pūjārigaṁ nivēdya raṁgabhōgakkavāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi bi .
Digital edition of SII 29.75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
